chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application 1093 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.26 2. For order on CMA No.2339/2023 3. For hearing of main case 16.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Hashim advocate holds brief for Mr. Ali Tahir, advocate for the applicant This reference application is pending since 2023 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Today brief is being held for applicant’s counsel and merely adjournment is being sought. It appears that the applicant, Commissioner Inland Revenue LTO, Zone-VI, Karachi is not interested in pursuing this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner of Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Rafeh Limited (PLD 2020 SC 518), this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
